test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_kc_single_key ( id UInt64 ) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_kc_single_key SELECT number FROM numbers(10000000)
test.query: SELECT count() FROM test_kc_single_key WHERE id = 4567890
SELECT count() FROM test_kc_single_key WHERE id IN (123, 456789, 2345678, 7654321, 9999999)
